nodes.label: AI as verification tool for simple calculations
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable source for complex tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I sometimes used ChatGPT to double-check my mathematical calculations for very simple questions

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: it was often wrong so my usage is minimal due to lack of trust

nodes.label: AI as supplemental tool distinct from colleagues
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human verification
nodes.grounding_span: I mainly think of it as a supplemental tool in its own category

nodes.label: AI integration with existing software
nodes.label_negative: AI as standalone tool without integration
nodes.grounding_span: it doesn't integrate with my lab software tools such as GraphPad

nodes.label: AI for literature review and synthesis
nodes.grounding_span: Literature review, definitely! Combing through papers and keeping track of info from multiple sources can take a ton of time

nodes.label: Epistemic trust and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: it's not trustworthy for the advanced math or conceptual understanding

nodes.label: Scientific rigor and methodological control
nodes.grounding_span: I do all my data analysis using GraphPad Prism and by the time I'm done, I'm confident in my work

nodes.label: Cautious minimal use due to trust issues
nodes.grounding_span: my usage is minimal due to lack of trust

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I am very optimistic that AI can be trained over time to become quite accurate and powerful

nodes.label: Desire for AI in literature review
nodes.grounding_span: If AI could be relied on to cite sources accurately, this would be a dream

nodes.label: Independent verification and cross-checking
nodes.grounding_span: I always use a calculator to begin with, and I do my own research to reference multiple external protocols

nodes.label: Pragmatic conditional trust based on task verifiability
nodes.grounding_span: If I couldn't validate something the AI is saying via my own external research/knowledge then I would not put faith into the AI's explanation
